name: Targeted LEPC Portfolio Export
description:
You are managing a multi-facility corporate portfolio in EPA Tier2 Submit 2025. Start by creating three new facilities to establish the portfolio:
1. Facility Name: 'Columbus DC', County: 'Franklin'. Add chemical: 'Sulfuric Acid' (CAS 7664-93-9).
2. Facility Name: 'Cleveland DC', County: 'Cuyahoga'. Add chemical: 'Sulfuric Acid' (CAS 7664-93-9).
3. Facility Name: 'Dublin DC', County: 'Franklin'. Add chemical: 'Propane' (CAS 74-98-6).

(You do not need to fill out all the detailed inventory amounts/hazards, just the facility names, counties, chemical names, and CAS numbers).

After creating the portfolio, the Local Emergency Planning Committee (LEPC) for Franklin county has requested data specifically for Sulfuric Acid sites. 

Use the 'File > Export > Tier2 Submit File' feature to selectively export ONLY the facility that meets BOTH criteria: located in Franklin county AND storing Sulfuric Acid. Save the exported .t2s file exactly to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\Franklin_County_Sulfuric_Acid.t2s'. Do NOT export the entire database.
